'''hawuru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:plackart|plackart]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-w-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:plackart|plackart]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hawuru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæwirith|hæwirith]] || [[word:hæwirij|hæwirij]] || [[word:hæwirish|hæwirish]] || [[word:hæwiri|hæwiri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hawuwuruth|hawuwuruth]] || [[word:hawuwuruj|hawuwuruj]] || [[word:hawuwurush|hawuwurush]] || [[word:hawuwuru|hawuwuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hawuruth|hawuruth]] || [[word:hawuruj|hawuruj]] || [[word:hawurush|hawurush]] || [[word:hawuru|hawuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hawufruth|hawufruth]] || [[word:hawufruj|hawufruj]] || [[word:hawufrush|hawufrush]] || [[word:hawufruf|hawufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hawuruthu|hawuruthu]] || [[word:hawuruju|hawuruju]] || [[word:hawurushu|hawurushu]] || [[word:hawuruku|hawuruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hawuruth|hawuruth]] || [[word:hawuruj|hawuruj]] || [[word:hawurush|hawurush]] || [[word:hawuru|hawuru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hawuruthul|hawuruthul]] || [[word:hawurujul|hawurujul]] || [[word:hawurushul|hawurushul]] || [[word:hawurukul|hawurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hawuruthuthu|hawuruthuthu]] || [[word:hawurujuju|hawurujuju]] || [[word:hawurushushu|hawurushushu]] || [[word:hawuruku|hawuruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hawuruthun|hawuruthun]] || [[word:hawurujun|hawurujun]] || [[word:hawurushun|hawurushun]] || [[word:hawurukun|hawurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hawuruthuoro|hawuruthuoro]] || [[word:hawurujuoro|hawurujuoro]] || [[word:hawurushuoro|hawurushuoro]] || [[word:hawurukuoro|hawurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
